# neoprint

> Open-source browser fingerprinting library. 19 signal collectors, 4 ID strategies, cross-browser identification, anti-detect browser detection, bot detection, behavioral biometrics. TypeScript, zero dependencies.

- Package: @neoprintjs/core
- Repository: https://github.com/neoprintjs/neoprint
- Docs: https://neoprint.dev
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@neoprintjs/core

## Guide

- [What is neoprint?](https://neoprint.dev/guide/what-is-neoprint) — Overview, key differentiators, technical specs
- [Getting Started](https://neoprint.dev/guide/getting-started) — Installation, quick start, Fingerprint object structure
- [Why neoprint?](https://neoprint.dev/guide/comparison) — Feature comparison table, common complaints solved
- [Fingerprint IDs](https://neoprint.dev/guide/fingerprint-ids) — 4 ID strategies: full, stable, weighted, cross-browser
- [Collectors](https://neoprint.dev/guide/collectors) — 19 built-in collectors with entropy/stability table
- [Confidence & Entropy](https://neoprint.dev/guide/confidence) — Scoring formula, when to trust a fingerprint
- [Cross-Browser ID](https://neoprint.dev/guide/cross-browser) — Hardware signal normalization, excluded signals
- [Anti-Detect Detection](https://neoprint.dev/guide/anti-detect) — Supported tools, detection methods
- [Fingerprint Lifecycle](https://neoprint.dev/guide/lifecycle) — Drift tracking, auto-linking, stability report
- [Bot Detection](https://neoprint.dev/guide/bot-detection) — 30+ signals, score thresholds
- [Spoofing Detection](https://neoprint.dev/guide/spoofing) — Cross-signal inconsistency rules
- [Behavioral Biometrics](https://neoprint.dev/guide/behavior) — Typing, mouse, scroll, touch profiling
- [Session Linking](https://neoprint.dev/guide/sessions) — Multi-storage persistence, fallback behavior
- [Server Validation](https://neoprint.dev/guide/server-hints) — Checksums, environment cross-referencing
- [Privacy Mode](https://neoprint.dev/guide/privacy) — GDPR considerations, 3 collection modes
- [Plugin System](https://neoprint.dev/guide/plugins) — Custom collectors, plugin interface

## API

- [API Overview](https://neoprint.dev/api/overview) — All methods, named exports, quick reference table
- [get()](https://neoprint.dev/api/get) — Generate fingerprint, options, return type
- [compare()](https://neoprint.dev/api/compare) — Fuzzy fingerprint comparison
- [detectBot()](https://neoprint.dev/api/detect-bot) — Bot/automation detection
- [detectSpoofing()](https://neoprint.dev/api/detect-spoofing) — Tampering detection
- [detectAntiDetect()](https://neoprint.dev/api/detect-anti-detect) — Anti-detect browser detection
- [detectNoise()](https://neoprint.dev/api/detect-noise) — Canvas/audio noise injection
- [detectIncognito()](https://neoprint.dev/api/detect-incognito) — Private browsing detection
- [environment()](https://neoprint.dev/api/environment) — OS/browser/VM/privacy profiling
- [lifecycle()](https://neoprint.dev/api/lifecycle) — Drift tracking, auto-linking
- [behavior](https://neoprint.dev/api/behavior) — Behavioral biometrics
- [serverHints()](https://neoprint.dev/api/server-hints) — Server validation payload
- [createSession()](https://neoprint.dev/api/session) — Cross-session persistence
- [Types](https://neoprint.dev/api/types) — All TypeScript type definitions

## Demo

- [Live Demo](https://neoprint.dev/demo/) — Interactive fingerprint scanner in browser
